channel.title: Notes on cha0s.re
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on cha0s.re

item.title: Reading a PE section table without tools
item.description: Section headers are 40 bytes each and sit immediately after the optional header. That is the whole trick.

item.title: Note: two builds, one hash
item.description: A link and a paragraph on why reproducible builds keep showing up in reverse engineering work.

item.title: Strings are a map of the binary
item.description: Before opening the graph view, read the string table. It tells you what the program thinks it is.
